productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Navy Blue Shoes
description: Style Note The classic boat shoe design is given a refined twist in this pair of shoes from U.S. Polo Association. With a croc-leather style finish, the design combines comfort and class effortlessly. Luxurious and stylish, yet practical and comfortable, this shoe is a great lounge wear option - perfect if you're thinking of taking a vacation or spending your weekend relaxing at a beach house! Product Details Blue slip-on with stitched detailing at the seams of the toe box, reinforced overlay at the heel counter and two metal eyelets with leather strips running through it at the centre Three lace-up for snug Fit Padded tongue and inner TPU outsole with herringbone and cylindrical grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
